title: Permian Oil Rig Count Increases for Two Straight Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the number of oil and gas rigs has risen for two weeks straight.

title: Baker Hughes to Supply Liquefaction Trains for Sempra Infrastructure's Port Arthur LNG Phase 1 Project
text: HOUSTON and LONDON, March 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), an energy technology company, announced Monday it has been awarded an order by Bechtel to supply two Main Refrigerant Compressors (MRCs) for Sempra Infrastructure's Port Arthur LNG Phase 1 project in Jefferson County, Texas, following the positive Final Investment Decision (FID) announced March 20.

title: Baker Hughes reports a weekly rise in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, +0.67% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil rose by four to 593 this week. That followed declines in each of the past five weeks.

title: Permian Oil Rig Count Rises After 4 Straight Weeks of Decline
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the count of oil and gas rigs rises following a decline in four straight weeks.

title: Baker Hughes (BKR) to Offer Additive Manufacturing Solutions
text: As part of the agreement with Oqton, Baker Hughes (BKR) is incorporating Oqton's MOS into its workflow, including its additive manufacturing solutions developed for vertical applications over the last 10 years.

title: Permian Oil Rig Count Falls for 4 Straight Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the count of oil and gas rigs decreases in four straight weeks.

title: 3 Red Flags for C3.ai's Future
text: A complicated product and transitioning billing model leave a lot of question marks. Operating expenses exceed revenue.

title: Baker Hughes data show a 4th straight weekly decline in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, -2.23% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil fell by two to 590 this week. That followed declines in each of the past three weeks.

title: Baker Hughes (BKR) to Develop DAC Technology With HIF Global
text: Baker Hughes (BKR) and HIF Global plan to examine the Mosaic Materials technology of the former to enhance DAC deployment at a commercial scale.

title: Baker Hughes and HIF Global to Collaborate on Direct Air Capture Technology
text: HOUSTON, March 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR), an energy technology company, and HIF Global, the world's leading eFuels company, announced Tuesday their agreement to cooperate on the development of technology to capture carbon dioxide directly from the atmosphere (“CO2 Direct Air Capture” or “DAC”). More specifically, HIF Global and Baker Hughes intend to test Baker Hughes' Mosaic DAC technology pilot units to accelerate DAC deployment at commercial scale.

title: Why C3.ai Stock Zigzagged on Monday
text: Kerrisdale Capital issued a short report on C3.ai stock Monday morning. C3, said the short-seller, is nothing more than a "no-growth, cash-burning industry flop.

title: Is C3.ai Stock a Buy Now?
text: C3's Q3 earnings cleared Wall Street's low bar. It expects its growth to remain sluggish for the rest of the year.

title: Permian Oil Rig Count Falls for 2 Straight Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the count of oil and gas rigs decreases in two straight weeks.
